Marshall E. Rosenbach, Esq., Law Offices of Marshall E. Rosenbahc, 561-627-8990 appearing for Plaintiff;(CourtCall)
Marilyn Raia, Esq., Bullivant Houser Bailey PC, 415-352-2700, appearing for Defendant Big 3 Entertainment;

RULING - A R G U E D. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT BIG 3 ENTERTAINMENT, INC. MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Motion For Summary Judgment

Taken under submission

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Court Reporter: Maria Torreano CSR# 8600 email: maria.torreano@gmail.com (302/RBU)

**After hearing, the Court adopts is tentative ruling denying defendant Big 3 Entertainment's motion for summary judgment. Order is signed. (see scanned order for details). Counsel is notifed of signed order.
